hero.subtitle: We drive your digital transformation. We carry your business into the future with innovative software solutions.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who Are We?
about.heading: Shaping the Future
about.p1: VoxeraTech is a technology company that offers modern software solutions. With our team specialized in web applications, mobile applications, enterprise software, and digital transformation projects, we are your trusted partner on your business's digital journey.
about.p2: By deeply understanding our customers' needs and using the latest technologies, we deliver scalable, secure, and high-performance solutions. In every project, we prioritize quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction.
about.missionText: To accelerate the digital transformation of businesses with the most innovative technologies and provide a competitive advantage.
about.visionText: To become a globally recognized, trusted, and innovative software solutions partner.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: What We Do?
services.subtitle: We offer comprehensive software solutions for your business's digital needs.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Modern and responsive web applications. We develop high-performance web solutions with current technologies like React, Next.js, and Vue.js.

items.title: Mobile App
items.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms. Fast and effective solutions with React Native and Flutter.

items.title: Database & Backend
items.description: Scalable and secure backend architectures. RESTful API, GraphQL, microservice architectures, and cloud solutions.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: User-centered, modern, and impressive interface designs. Usability testing and user experience optimization.

projects.label: Our Projects
projects.title: Recent Work
projects.subtitle: Some of the projects we've brought to life for our clients and in-house.

items.title: ebcturkiye.com
items.subtitle: Personal Portfolio & CV Platform
items.description: A modern personal portfolio website designed and developed from scratch for Enes Buğra Cengiz. The site consists of Home, About Me, and Contact pages, presenting all professional information including work experience, technical skills, featured projects, and certifications in an elegant and responsive interface.

items.title: WordPulse: Learn Fast
items.subtitle: Apple Watch Vocabulary Learning App
items.description: Developed exclusively for Apple Watch, WordPulse lets you learn foreign language vocabulary quickly and effectively through wrist gestures. The app offers personalized flashcards using the spaced repetition method, making it easy to learn during your daily routine.
features: Dedicated watchOS interface for Apple Watch
